briefdescription.para: This is the interrupt handler routine for the BRAM interrupt for this example.

parameterdescription.para: is the Callback reference for the handler.

briefdescription.para: This is the entry function from the TestAppGen tool generated application which tests the interrupts when enabled in the BRAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a reference to the BRAM driver Instance
contains the base address of the device

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the example is successful.

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function performs the BRAM set up for Interrupts.

detaileddescription.para:
IntcInstancePtr
is a reference to the Interrupt Controller driver Instance
InstancePtr
is a reference to the BRAM driver Instance
DeviceId
is the XPAR_<BRAM_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h
IntrId
is XPAR_<INTC_instance>_<BRAM_instance>_INTERRUPT_INTR value from xparameters.h
XST_SUCCESS if the interrupt setup is successful.
XST_FAILURE if interrupt setup is not successful.
None. This function ensures that ECC in the BRAM is initialized if no hardware initialization is available. The ECC bits are initialized by reading and writing data in the memory. This code is not optimized to only read data in initialized sections of the BRAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific BRAM device.
is the device base address in the virtual memory address space.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the BRAM example.

detaileddescription.para: It is for initializing the BRAM device and setting up interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the BRAM driver (XBram) in an interrupt driven mode of operation.

detaileddescription.para: This example assumes that there is an interrupt controller in the hardware system and the BRAM device is connected to the interrupt controller.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a sa 05/11/10 Initial release. 3.01a sa 13/01/12 Changed XBram_SelfTest(InstancePtr) to XBram_SelfTest(InstancePtr, XBRAM_IR_ALL_MASK) as per new API (CR 639274) 4.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. 4.7 mus 08/25/21 BRAM and interrupt controller instance need not to be declared in case of peripheral test, added condition to skip them in case of peripheral test (CR#1108877) 4.9 sd 07/07/23 Added SDT support. 4.13 ml 07/14/25 Fix GCC warnings. 4.14 vlt 12/12/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
